name: @metorial/highergov
description: Search and retrieve U.S. government contracting and grants data. Query 61M+ federal contract awards, 4M+ grant awards, contract and grant opportunities, awardee profiles, government contacts, contract vehicles, agencies, and related documents. Filter opportunities by source type, date, agency, NAICS/PSC codes, and saved search criteria. Look up 1.5M+ contractor/grantee profiles with subsidiary relationships for competitive analysis and teaming partner research. Access 130K+ government buyer contacts. Retrieve 3M+ documents including RFPs, schedules, and protest decisions. Manage business development pursuit pipelines and push pursuits to external CRMs via webhooks. Supports quick search/autocomplete for building search interfaces.
